HeroSection.description: From Madeira to the biggest stadiums in the world, <white>Cristiano Ronaldo</white> became a symbol of discipline, sacrifice, and ambition. His story proves that with <green>hard work and dedication</green>, greatness is possible.

ServicesSection.description: Explore the key moments that shaped Cristiano Ronaldo into a global football icon and role model.

WhyChooseUsSection.description: Ronaldo's journey was not always easy. At age 15, he faced a serious heart condition, but after successful surgery and full family support, he continued chasing his dream. Today, <white>Cristiano Ronaldo</white> uses his influence to support charities, pediatric hospitals, and vulnerable children around the world.

quote.text: Your love makes me strong, your hate makes me unstoppable.

WhyChooseUsSection.imageAlt: Football player inspiring youth through discipline and social impact

PlansSection.description: Ronaldo constantly encourages young people to believe in discipline, effort, and ambition. His story shows that talent is important, but <italic>hard work and dedication make the difference.</italic>

custom.description: Your love makes me strong, your hate makes me unstoppable.

manifesto.title: Built by effort
manifesto.description: Cristiano Ronaldo's message is not only about football. It is about preparation, sacrifice, discipline, and the courage to keep moving forward when circumstances are difficult.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.description: Greatness is built through daily habits, training, commitment, and the decision to improve even when no one is watching.

focus.title: Focus
focus.description: His career shows that success requires clear goals, mental strength, and the ability to transform pressure into motivation.

legacy.title: Legacy
legacy.description: Beyond trophies and records, Ronaldo inspires young people to believe that difficult beginnings do not define their future.

final.title: Dream big, work harder, and never stop improving.

AdditionalServices.description: Expand your electrical project with complementary services designed to improve safety, efficiency, and long-term performance.

FAQ.title: Frequently
FAQ.description: Quick answers to common questions about our electrical services, installation process, maintenance, and service coverage.

Footer.mission: A tribute-style page about Cristiano Ronaldo's journey, discipline, social impact, and influence as a global football role model.
Footer.quote: Your love makes me strong, your hate makes me unstoppable.

content.title: Why Choose Us
content.description: At ElectroVolt, we provide reliable electrical services focused on safety, efficiency, and professional execution. Our team works with attention to detail to deliver solutions as dependable as a <green>stable electrical system</green> and as efficient as a <orange>high-performance installation</orange>.

customPage.description: Enter the information from your custom quote to continue with the secure payment process. Make sure the folio matches the one provided by your advisor.

hero.title: Our <orange>Services</orange><green>.</green>
hero.description: Discover our electrical solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial projects.

shared.title: Electrical <orange>Installations</orange>
shared.description: Professional electrical installations for homes, businesses, and workspaces. We handle wiring, outlets, panels, lighting circuits, and safe energy distribution according to your project needs.

vps.title: Preventive <green>Maintenance</green>
vps.description: Keep your electrical system operating safely and efficiently. We inspect connections, panels, breakers, loads, and potential faults before they become costly problems.

dedicated.title: Electrical <orange>Diagnostics</orange>
dedicated.description: We identify electrical faults, overloads, voltage issues, damaged components, and unsafe conditions using a professional and methodical inspection process.
